overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a nighttime scene under an urban overpass with a bonfire, NPCs, and neon signage. The camera pans around the environment revealing a glowing pyramid structure before tilting up to watch a flying AV vehicle pass overhead with searchlights scanning the area.

events.description: camera begins slow pan to the left around the bonfire

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the bonfire while observing the NPCs and surroundings under the overpass

notable_agents.action: standing near the fire wearing a red jacket
standing still and observing the bonfire

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and beams forming a highway overpass overhead
burning fire pit surrounded by rocks providing warm orange light
derelict cars and debris parked under the overpass
illuminated transit station sign visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete overpass at night, centered on a burning bonfire. Two NPCs in red jackets stand near the fire while the camera slowly circles the area. The environment is wet from rain, with abandoned vehicles visible in the background and the glow of distant neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass plaza with neon art installation

events.description: large neon pyramid structure comes into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left, revealing the glowing pyramid structure and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: walking away from the fire toward the background shadows

entered.detail: large geometric pyramid frame with bright cyan neon lighting and triangular trusses
vegetation hanging down from the overpass concrete beams
distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the overpass

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, a striking neon-lit pyramid structure dominates the left side of the frame. The bonfire remains visible but the focus shifts to the geometric light installation and the distant city skyline. Sparse vegetation hangs from the concrete overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: night sky corridor with aerial vehicle traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to follow a large flying AV vehicle approaching overhead
flying AV passes directly overhead with bright searchlights scanning the ground below

agents.ego_description: looking straight up at the flying vehicle passing overhead, tracking its movement

notable_agents.action: large dark aerodyne vehicle with active searchlights flying overhead

entered.detail: massive dark aerodyne vehicle with bright white searchlights and orange running lights
bright white light beams projecting downward from the AV, cutting through the rain

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive flying AV vehicle passing overhead, its searchlights cutting through the rainy night sky. The neon pyramid remains visible on the left while the vehicle dominates the center of the frame, creating a dramatic silhouette against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a gritty urban campfire and ascends toward the high-tech skyline of a rainy metropolis. It begins under a massive concrete overpass, circling a burning bonfire where two NPCs in red jackets stand amidst wet pavement and abandoned vehicles. As the camera pans left, the focus shifts from the fire toward a striking neon-lit pyramid structure that dominates the frame against a distant city skyline. The scene then tilts upward, leaving the geometric installation below to reveal a massive flying AV vehicle passing overhead. Finally, the vehicle's searchlights cut through the dark, rainy sky, creating a dramatic silhouette as it glides across the center of the frame.
